name: Xero
access_notes: Developers can sign up for a free developer account to access the API. A tiered pricing model with a free starter tier (up to 5 connections) exists, but developers can get credentials and start building immediately on a self-serve basis.
one_liner: Xero is a global small business accounting platform that provides an API for developers to integrate with accounting data such as invoices, bank transactions, and contacts.
mcp_notes: Xero has officially released an MCP server designed for accounting data.

evidence.claim: Xero provides a developer platform where users can sign up for a free account to build and test integrations.
Xero utilizes OAuth 2.0 and has introduced a tiered pricing model that includes a free starter tier.
The Xero API is a RESTful API that allows developers to access various resources like invoices and contacts.
Xero has released an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for accounting data.

api_notes: The Xero Accounting API is comprehensive, covering core objects like invoices, contacts, bank transactions, and more.
auth_notes: The API uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication and authorization. Custom connections also use the client credentials grant type.
